name: codex-agent-harness-template
description: Reusable Codex agent harness template for ChatGPT idea intake, Linear work queues, and Symphony-style GitHub execution.

scripts.intake:demo: node dist/cli.js intake validate .agent-harness/docs/templates/idea-pack.template.md && node dist/cli.js intake compile .agent-harness/docs/templates/idea-pack.template.md --out .agent-harness/intake/compiled/template-demo && node dist/cli.js intake promote .agent-harness/intake/compiled/template-demo --dry-run
